Feature / Outcome: Browse results feel clear and usable
Task: Review the Browse Datasets page and improve spacing, result density, empty state, active filter visibility, and mobile layout without changing the core route behavior
Definition of Done: Guest and logged-in browse pages are readable on desktop and mobile; filters do not dominate results; empty state is clear

Feature / Outcome: Dataset Preview behaves like a real preview
Task: Polish the preview modal content, focus behavior, close behavior, and responsive layout so users can scan metadata before opening the detail page
Definition of Done: Preview opens from each result, closes by button/backdrop/Escape, returns focus to the trigger, and does not overlap or clip content

Feature / Outcome: Detail page encourages citation before download
Task: Improve the dataset detail sidebar and citation area so metadata, citation, BibTeX, and Download ZIP are easy to find in the right order
Definition of Done: Citation and BibTeX are visible before or near download; Download ZIP remains on detail page only; recommendations still render
Notes / Blockers: Do not re-add browse direct download

Feature / Outcome: Citation text is easy to reuse
Task: Add copy-to-clipboard buttons for plain citation and BibTeX with visible success feedback
Definition of Done: Both copy buttons copy the correct text and show a short confirmation
Notes / Blockers: Keep JavaScript small and local or shared

Task: Improve upload form labels, helper text, validation display, anonymization confirmation, and file guidance
Definition of Done: A new contributor can understand required metadata and ZIP upload rules; invalid submission errors are specific and readable
Evidence: Screenshots for normal and validation-error states
Notes / Blockers: Upload must still create Pending Review

Feature / Outcome: My Datasets clearly shows ownership and status
Task: Improve My Datasets cards so status, access type, edit/archive actions, and next step are obvious
Definition of Done: Owner can distinguish Published, Pending Review, Revision Requested, Rejected, and Archived items at a glance
Evidence: Screenshot with seeded or test records

Task: Improve the edit page copy and states so contributors know when changes preserve status versus return to Pending Review
Definition of Done: Edit form communicates versioning and review impact; update still increments version and respects owner-only access

Task: Verify and refine forgot-password/reset-password pages, invalid token state, expired token state, and success messages
Definition of Done: Active account can request reset in development, use displayed link, change password, and log in with the new password; invalid token shows a clear message
Evidence: Manual test note with routes checked
Notes / Blockers: Email sending remains out of scope

Task: Review login/register forms for labels, autocomplete, helper copy, validation errors, and mobile layout
Definition of Done: Login/register are clear on desktop and mobile; errors are readable; seeded account remains visible for local demo
Evidence: Screenshots and one failed-login test note
Notes / Blockers: Do not switch to Google auth

Feature / Outcome: Dataset access rules are protected by tests
Task: Add feature tests for guest browse, logged-in browse, detail access, private/restricted access behavior, and detail-page download
Files / Area: tests/; app/Controllers/Datasets.php only if bug fix needed
Definition of Done: Tests pass and cover public, institutional, restricted, private, archived, and non-published cases

Feature / Outcome: Contributor lifecycle is protected by tests
Task: Add feature tests for upload, owner edit, version increment, owner archive, and non-owner denial
Files / Area: tests/; upload/dataset controllers only if bug fix needed
Definition of Done: Tests prove contributor can manage own datasets but not others; upload starts Pending Review; archive removes from public browse

Task: Expand MvpSeeder to include records for all useful public/user states and access labels without duplicating rows when rerun
Definition of Done: Seeder can be run repeatedly; demo includes enough records to inspect access labels and owner statuses
Evidence: php spark db:seed MvpSeeder plus screenshots

Task: Review controller/model validation for dataset metadata, access type, ZIP upload, password fields, and required fields
Definition of Done: Invalid input is rejected with clear messages; status/access values remain closed sets
Evidence: Test output or manual validation notes

Task: Improve recommendation display with category/type context and verify recommendation candidates respect access and published status
Definition of Done: Similar datasets are relevant enough for MVP and never show unauthorized/archived/rejected records
Notes / Blockers: No AI/ML recommender in this branch

Task: Review home page sections, featured datasets, partner logos, calls to action, and mobile layout
Definition of Done: Home page explains browse/upload value, shows real seeded/Published data, and is visually consistent

Task: Review header, mobile nav, footer, active links, flash notices, and authenticated/guest states
Definition of Done: Navigation works for guest and logged-in users; logout form works with CSRF; notices are readable
Evidence: Screenshots for guest and logged-in nav

Task: Check labels, keyboard focus, modal behavior, contrast, form errors, and skip/screen-reader utility classes
Definition of Done: Main flows can be navigated by keyboard; form fields have labels; modal focus and close behavior are acceptable

Task: Improve README/SETUP/TASKS wording only where a new teammate would be confused after reading once
Definition of Done: A teammate can clone, configure, migrate, seed, run, test, and choose a task without asking for chat history

Task: Add a deploy checklist for school/shared hosting: PHP version, web root, writable folders, env, database, migrations, HTTPS, and seed policy
Definition of Done: Checklist exists and separates local dev from deployment
Notes / Blockers: Do not deploy from this task

Task: Create a short audit template teammates can paste into PRs after testing their task
Definition of Done: Template includes what changed, screenshots/tests, manual route checks, and known limits
